response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems programming aptitude, but the absence of proven C++ in commercial routing systems and limited evidence of fault-tolerant distributed systems design raises significant concerns.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience with GISCollective, including real-world deployment for environmental mapping.
Strong systems programming background using DLang, asynchronous I/O, and low-latency systems.
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and contribute to open-source infrastructure.
concerns: No visible commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing, navigation, or map tile pipelines.
Lacks explicit evidence of distributed systems work (consistency, service discovery, fault tolerance) at scale.
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, with minimal alignment to required C++/Linux server stack.
